pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with Java 21 causes compilation errors or runtime failures due to incompatible bytecode and removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 8 bytecode, which is incompatible with the intended Java 21 runtime environment and features.
